title.en: SOUND-PRODUCING DEVICES; METHODS OR DEVICES FOR PROTECTING AGAINST, OR FOR DAMPING, NOISE OR OTHER ACOUSTIC WAVES IN GENERAL; ACOUSTICS NOT OTHERWISE PROVIDED FOR
Devices in which sound is produced by striking a resonating body, e.g. bells, chimes or gongs (multi-toned musical instruments G10D13/08; automatic carillons G10F1/10)
the resonating devices having the shape of a bell, plate, rod, or tube (bells for towers G10K1/28)
Bells for towers or the like
Rattles or like noise-producing devices {, e.g. door-knockers}
Whistles
Ultrasonic whistles
Sirens
{Ultrasonic sirens}
in which the sound-producing member is rotated manually or by a motor (G10K7/06 takes precedence)
in which the sound-producing member is driven by a fluid, e.g. by a compressed gas
Devices in which sound is produced by vibrating a diaphragm or analogous element, e.g. fog horns, vehicle hooters or buzzers (loudspeakers or like acoustic electromechanical transducers H04R)
driven by gas; e.g. suction operated
driven by water or other liquids
driven by mechanical means only
electrically operated
Details, e.g. bulbs, pumps, pistons, switches or casings
Methods or devices for transmitting, conducting or directing sound in general; Methods or devices for protecting against, or for damping, noise or other acoustic waves in general
{Devices for damping, suppressing, obstructing or conducting sound in acoustic devices (G10K1/06 - G10K1/10 take precedence; for electro-mechanical transducers for communication H04R3/002)}

{Mounting transducers, e.g. provided with mechanical moving or orienting device (mountings specially adapted to a particular sound-producing device, see the preceding groups G10K1/00 - G10K9/00, e.g. G10K1/26, G10K1/28, G10K9/22; arrangements of sonic watch equipment on submarines B63G8/39; buoys B63B22/00)}
Mechanical acoustic impedances; Impedance matching, e.g. by horns; Acoustic resonators
Non-electric sound-amplifying devices, e.g. non-electric megaphones (amplifying by horns G10K11/02; amplifying by focusing G10K11/26)
Methods or devices for protecting against, or for damping, noise or other acoustic waves in general (G10K11/36 takes precedence)
Methods or devices for transmitting, conducting or directing sound (G10K11/02, G10K11/36 take precedence)
Devices for manipulating acoustic surface waves (electro-acoustic amplifiers H03F13/00; networks comprising electro-acoustic elements H03H9/00)
Cones, diaphragms, or the like, for emitting or receiving sound in general (for electromechanical transducers H04R7/00)
Acoustics not otherwise provided for
Synthesis of acoustic waves (synthesis of speech G10L13/00)
Sound-producing devices (G10K15/02 takes precedence)
Arrangements for producing a reverberation or echo sound {(modifying acoustic properties to change reverberation time G10K11/002)}
Details of methods or devices for transmitting, conducting or directing sound in general
Beamforming, e.g. time reversal, phase conjugation or similar
Underwater, e.g. transducers for generating acoustic waves underwater
Details of active noise control [ANC] covered by G10K11/178 but not provided for in any of its subgroups
Applications
Means
Miscellaneous
